records.m_Talk_ENG: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What should we do, Sonya? We got our weapons, so should we just blow everything up and make a run for it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I was wondering what all the ruckus was about. I guess a few C.O.s crawled up.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I was wondering what all the ruckus was about. I guess a few C.O.s crawled up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you all take care of these yourselves? Without any weapons?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you all take care of these yourselves? Without any weapons?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You there! Where do you think you're going?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You there! Where do you think you're going?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You there! Where do you think you're going?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You. Come here and show your hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sonya, maybe we really should blow everything up...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trying to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you'll be given extra credit if you claim you handled all the C.O.s yourself... Right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you'll be given extra credit if you claim you handled all the C.O.s yourself... Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank god.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You asked for money earlier. Are you girls also prisoners working at the bulwark?

records.m_Talk_FRA: You asked for money earlier. Are you girls also prisoners working at the bulwark?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha ha! Damn right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha ha! Damn right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha ha! Damn right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But pirates are the dream!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But pirates are the dream!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But pirates are the dream!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not wrong.

records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to be pirates to make money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to be pirates to make money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like fish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like fish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like fish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to get the fresh food I want, I needed to go out to the ocean myself.

records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to get the fresh food I want, I needed to go out to the ocean myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hn-hm, you wouldn't call it measly once you try the tuna from the ocean, mister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about you? What's your story in becoming a pirate?

records.m_Talk_FRA: How about you? What's your story in becoming a pirate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah, I guess becoming a pirate was the only choice for that lady.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not too keen on going somewhere littered with C.O.s, either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It's not a giant C.O. or anything, right? That would be horrible...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this really safe?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the bulwark was the worst place to be assigned to... But I never thought I'd be going against a high-Grade Counter.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's coming! I see the ship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get ready to take her down as soon as she gets off!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two. I warned you that you'll end up in solitary if you keep slacking off.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What should we do, Sonya? We got our weapons, so should we just blow everything up and make a run for it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What should we do, Sonya? We got our weapons, so should we just blow everything up and make a run for it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's too risky. The ocean wall may have light security, but the security for prisoner escape routes is airtight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll talk to them and give you a sign, so hide your weapon in the meantime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I heard people scream, so I just stopped by to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I was wondering what all the ruckus was about. I guess a few C.O.s crawled up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I was wondering what all the ruckus was about. I guess a few C.O.s crawled up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I was wondering what all the ruckus was about. I guess a few C.O.s crawled up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you all take care of these yourselves? Without any weapons?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you all take care of these yourselves? Without any weapons?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you all take care of these yourselves? Without any weapons?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. I think I smell gunpowder.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. I think I smell gunpowder.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. I think I smell gunpowder.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You there! Where do you think you're going?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You there! Where do you think you're going?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You there! Where do you think you're going?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I was too nervous... and I don't feel well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You. Come here and show your hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You. Come here and show your hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You. Come here and show your hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sonya, maybe we really should blow everything up...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sonya, maybe we really should blow everything up...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sonya, maybe we really should blow everything up...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you punish us for leaving the designated work area, it would only make you look bad for failing to watch us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trying to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm saying that you should leave us be and forget about us. We're going to quietly step back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you'll be given extra credit if you claim you handled all the C.O.s yourself... Right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, you'll be given extra credit if you claim you handled all the C.O.s yourself... Right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you'll be given extra credit if you claim you handled all the C.O.s yourself... Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Deal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Deal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Deal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank god.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank god.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank god.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You asked for money earlier. Are you girls also prisoners working at the bulwark?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You asked for money earlier. Are you girls also prisoners working at the bulwark?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You asked for money earlier. Are you girls also prisoners working at the bulwark?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why else would we crawl into this hellhole to save you all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha ha! Damn right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha ha! Damn right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha ha! Damn right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates. You chose quite a difficult career path.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But pirates are the dream!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But pirates are the dream!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But pirates are the dream!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I was young, the Great Pirate was on the top of the lawless food chain. It was the golden age for pirates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That so-called dream the missy talked about also existed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But, that age ended when the Great Pirate Avery fell and the Front Bay Administration came into play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These days, pirates are treated as nothing but criminals who roam the sea without the Administration's authorization.

root.m_Talk_DEU: These days, pirates are treated as nothing but criminals who roam the sea without the Administration's authorization.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These days, pirates are treated as nothing but criminals who roam the sea without the Administration's authorization.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to be pirates to make money.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to be pirates to make money.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to be pirates to make money.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if you want to go out in the sea, you can take a test to become an official hunter.

root.m_Talk_FRA: And if you want to go out in the sea, you can take a test to become an official hunter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're aware of that, why did you become a pirate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like fish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like fish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like fish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the fish you get for an ordinary meal are small because they were farmed in the inner harbor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to get the fresh food I want, I needed to go out to the ocean myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to get the fresh food I want, I needed to go out to the ocean myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to get the fresh food I want, I needed to go out to the ocean myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You became a pirate for some measly fish?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You became a pirate for some measly fish?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You became a pirate for some measly fish?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hn-hm, you wouldn't call it measly once you try the tuna from the ocean, mister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hn-hm, you wouldn't call it measly once you try the tuna from the ocean, mister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hn-hm, you wouldn't call it measly once you try the tuna from the ocean, mister.

root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It won't be able to open for a while, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It won't be able to open for a while, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fascinating. You were born after the sea was closed off, and you're interested in fish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fascinating. You were born after the sea was closed off, and you're interested in fish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fascinating. You were born after the sea was closed off, and you're interested in fish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely rare to see fresh seafood that's not canned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely rare to see fresh seafood that's not canned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely rare to see fresh seafood that's not canned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about you? What's your story in becoming a pirate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about you? What's your story in becoming a pirate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about you? What's your story in becoming a pirate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I became a pirate to fire my cannon!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but destroy everything with firepower! Like houses! And ships!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah, I guess becoming a pirate was the only choice for that lady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah, I guess becoming a pirate was the only choice for that lady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah, I guess becoming a pirate was the only choice for that lady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then have you girls... been out to the deep sea area?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then have you girls... been out to the deep sea area?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then have you girls... been out to the deep sea area?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. There aren't a lot of tasty fish there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. There aren't a lot of tasty fish there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. There aren't a lot of tasty fish there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not too keen on going somewhere littered with C.O.s, either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not too keen on going somewhere littered with C.O.s, either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not too keen on going somewhere littered with C.O.s, either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't C.O.s be the perfect targets for your cannon?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't C.O.s be the perfect targets for your cannon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still value my life, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still value my life, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still value my life, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! Scared, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! Scared, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! Scared, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're right. There's nothing more valuable than your life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you're right. There's nothing more valuable than your life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're right. There's nothing more valuable than your life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, why are you pirates here and not out at sea?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... We got caught in a fight with some hunters, and might've blown up a tiny bit of a shop.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Tiny bit? How much is that?

root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe 49 percent?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe 49 percent?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe 49 percent?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Black Flood is going to begin soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Already?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Already?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's only been a few years, how can it...?
